arts.ttl: Why Barcelona’s kamikaze offside trap could change football
arts.sum: Barcelona have caught more players offside than any other team in Europe by a remarkable distance, writes Lawrence Ostlere. So will Hansi Flick’s radical tactics catch on or are Barca starting to get found out?

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Atalanta: Champions League
arts.sum: Barcelona host Atalanta in their final game of the Champions League league phase aiming to overtake Liverpool for the top spot in the standings.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Atalanta: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Barcelona's Champions League clash with Atalanta, including how to watch on TV and live stream, team news and predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Barca starlet Pau Prim set to join Xavi’s former club Al-Sadd
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Paul Prim is reportedly is set to join Unai Hernandez in making a move away from the club in the January transfer window. The 18-year-old has agreed a deal with Al-Sadd, forrmerly managed by Xavi, and could join the club shortly.

arts.ttl: Barca loanee Alex Valle agrees Como move after cutting short Celtic stay
arts.sum: Barcelona loanee Alex Valle is set to spend the second half of the season on loan with Como after seeing his deal with Celtic terminated. Fabrizio Romano reports that a verbal agreement has been reached for the left-back to sign for Como on loan for the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star is dominating La Liga in chances created this season
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the ongoing excellence of Barcelona star Raphinha in the final third, has on Tuesday come to the fore online. Wide-man Raphinha is of course in the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona talent set to join up with Karim Benzema’s Al-Ittihad
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have agreed on the terms of a deal to sell youth midfielder Unai Hernández to Saudi outfit Al-Ittihad. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Madrid: Why May's El Clasico could end up at Wembley
arts.sum: El Clasico between Barcelona and Real Madrid could end up being played at Wembley Stadium in a bizarre twist in the final stages of the season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star set to see one-year contract extension triggered early
arts.sum: The board at La Liga giants Barcelona are all set to trigger a one-year contract extension for a leading member of the club’s backline. That’s according to Jijantes, who point…

arts.ttl: Atalanta boss Gian Piero Gasperini hails Hansi Flick’s Barcelona project
arts.sum: Serie A side Atalanta take on Barcelona in the Champions League tomorrow and the game will determine where both sides finish in the competition. While La Dea and the Catalans…
